text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Summer is nearly over. I'd say that training went
rather well, wouldn't you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
More than anything else, we made great use of
our time. I applaud your efforts, guinea pig.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
With that being said, we must not grow
complacent! There are only two months until the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: In that time, we'll need to perfect my physical form and fulfill every requirement for victory!
